summary: First testing iteration for 'The Elegant Exchange — Back of Haus'. Wrote a pytest regression suite covering auth/RBAC, dashboard, consignors CRUD, inventory batch + auto-expiry, sales (50/50 split), payouts queue + processing + overpay guard, analytics, and Square not-configured state. All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend smoke-tested in Playwright across login (owner & staff), dashboard, sidebar nav, consignors list + add dialog, inventory filters, sales, payouts (owner-only), analytics, and settings. Staff RBAC verified: Payouts/Analytics/Settings hidden from sidebar AND visiting /payouts redirects to /. Square section correctly shows 'not configured' warning.

issues: Non-fatal React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' originating in Login.jsx — looks like a setState during render (likely a Navigate / redirect inside the render body). Should be wrapped in useEffect or a side effect. Currently does not break functionality.

action_items: Optional: fix the React 'setState during render' warning in src/pages/Login.jsx (move <Navigate/> or redirect logic into useEffect).
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py prefers cookie over Authorization header (fine, but document this in API docs as some clients will see surprising behavior when both are present).
Consignor delete blocks if any inventory exists — should consider 'archive' instead of hard delete for items already sold.
Inventory POST /api/inventory/batch lacks Pydantic body validation (uses raw dict); consider a proper schema to surface friendlier 422s.
Settings.jsx Square copy says 'restart the backend' — given hot-reload is on for .env changes via supervisor, message is still accurate; no change needed.
test_credentials: Owner: info@elegantexchange.co / ElegantExchange2026!  |  Staff: staff@elegantexchange.co / Staff2026!
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates TEST_-prefixed consignor and items (TEST_Auto Consignor, TEST_Jacket, TEST_Shirt) and one sale + one small ($5) payout against the top-balance seeded consignor. No cleanup performed; safe to leave for next run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the canonical regression for this app. Each test uses an isolated requests.Session so that httpOnly access_token cookies from prior logins do not leak across tests (cookie has precedence over Bearer header in auth.get_current_user). API field names of note: ConsignorCreate.full_name (not name), payout_method (not payment_method); InventoryItemCreate.asking_price (not price); payouts queue returns balance_owed; inventory items carry both id (uuid) and item_id (EE-XXX-NN); consignors carry both id (uuid) and consignor_id (EE-###). Use consignor_id / item_id when interacting with downstream APIs. Square credentials are intentionally empty; /api/square/sync returns 400, /api/square/status returns configured=false.
